prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别约707名、1274名、1100名、1981名、1617名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2024年明显后移至1981名，2025年回升至1617名，近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约1617名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为75人，2024年降至71人，2025年进一步降至69人，2026年计划70人，较2025年微增1人，属小幅扩招，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第17名（Top20），近年排名稳定在17–19名区间，学校层次极高；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件；2025年评价为中性/混合（有A++学科正面信号也有师德负面事件）；抖音热度总排名第44位（较热），无明显热度推升效应；2021–2025年均无投档异常记录，录取走势稳定；第五轮学科评估中A+学科9个（法学、理论经济学、应用经济学、新闻传播学、社会学、统计学、工商管理、马克思主义理论、中国语言文学），A学科5个（哲学、政治学、中国史、外国语言文学、计算机科学与技术），A-学科1个（物理学），A-及以上共15个学科，人文社科领域实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、金融/财经/经济等人大王牌专业大类社会热度偏热至分化观望；计算机类、统计学类等理工专业热度较高；浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增加约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；省控线近年稳定在490分左右，无明显波动；中国人民大学位于北京，非浙江省本地院校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在浙江招生占比约2%左右（2025年69人/全国总计划），属正常外省招生比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划仅微增1人、浙江省考生数大幅增加约37.6%导致竞争加剧、学校层次极高但声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基准位次1617名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约1681名，区间1489–1873名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（北京）
- 金融学类（北京）（含金融学、保险学）
- 经济学类（北京）（新时代经济学拔尖人才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 统计学类（北京）（数智科学家计划）
- 新闻传播学类（北京）
- 人工智能（北京）
- 计算机类（北京）（图灵计算机拔尖人才班/AI全栈工程师计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（北京）（数智化方向）
- 人力资源管理（北京）（经管交叉）
- 社会学类（北京）（社会科学基础理论拔尖人才班）
- 数学类（北京）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1489–1873名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为稳妥保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如1500名以内），可重点冲刺法学、金融学类等一档王牌专业；若位次接近区间上限（如1800名左右），建议以二档的统计学类、计算机类为主，三档的工商管理类、人力资源管理作为保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang comprehensive category were approximately 707, 1274, 1100, 1981, and 1617 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, it significantly moved back to 1981, and in 2025 it rebounded to 1617, with large fluctuations in the past two years, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1617; the university's enrollment plan for Zhejiang comprehensive category was 75 from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 71 in 2024, further decreased to 69 in 2025, and is planned at 70 in 2026, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, which is a small expansion and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 17–19 range in recent years, indicating a very high university level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents; the 2025 evaluation is neutral/mixed (with positive signals from A++ disciplines and negative teacher ethics incidents); Douyin popularity ranks 44th overall (relatively popular), with no significant popularity boost effect; no abnormal admission records from 2021 to 2025, with stable admission trends; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Journalism and Communication, Sociology, Statistics, Business Administration, Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature), 5 A disciplines (Philosophy, Political Science, Chinese History, Foreign Languages and Literature, Computer Science and Technology), and 1 A- discipline (Physics), totaling 15 disciplines at A- or above, with top national strength in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics and other top majors at Renmin University have social popularity ranging from hot to divergent and wait-and-see; Computer Science, Statistics and other science and engineering majors are relatively popular; the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 291,000 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; the provincial control line has been stable around 490 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local institution in Zhejiang Province, so there is no local admission preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang is about 2% (69 in 2025 out of total national plan), which is a normal out-of-province enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the enrollment plan for 2026 only slightly increases by 1, the significant increase of about 37.6% in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province leading to intensified competition, the very high university level but somewhat negative reputation, based on the baseline ranking of 1617 in 2025, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1681, with a range of 1489–1873.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (Beijing)
- Finance (Beijing) (including Finance, Insurance)
- Economics (Beijing) (New Era Economics Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Statistics (Beijing) (Data Science and AI Scientist Program)
- Journalism and Communication (Beijing)
- Artificial Intelligence (Beijing)
- Computer Science (Beijing) (Turing Computer Top Talent Class/AI Full-Stack Engineer Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Business Administration (Beijing) (Digital and Intelligent Direction)
- Human Resource Management (Beijing) (Economics and Management Cross)
- Sociology (Beijing) (Social Science Basic Theory Top Talent Class)
- Mathematics (Beijing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1489–1873, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 top majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 top majors such as Law and Finance; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 1800), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors like Statistics and Computer Science, with Tier 3 majors such as Business Administration and Human Resource Management as backup.
